mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, receiver_name as receiverName, receiver_phone as receiverPhone, province, city, district, detail_address as detailAddress, is_default as isDefault FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO addresses (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE addresses SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE addresses SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
